title: C rejects AddrMode ELIDED (0b11); Python and Rust accept (spec OPTIONAL)
description: C frame.c:63-66 (parse) and :121-124 (write) return -EINVAL for LICHEN_ADDR_ELIDED. Python frame.py:36,45 (ELIDED=3, addr_len 0, tested at test_frame.py:71) and Rust frame.rs:64,74 accept it. draft-01:162 calls elided OPTIONAL; no TX path in any implementation emits it today, but it is a wire-level accept/reject differential: a future elided-mode frame would be dropped by C nodes only. Fix: either implement ELIDED in C parse/write or remove it from Python/Rust and the spec.
